Docs  ›  Commands

All Revit commands

Auto-generated from every [Transaction]-decorated class. 573 commands.

573 /573Commands
310 /573fully documented
128 /573with documented returns
5 /573public REST API
573 of 573

Commands are grouped by mini-project — the area of the platform they belong to (Drainage, Lighting, Ventilation, etc.). The mini-project comes from the source plan in BUILD MEP Plan/ via the Pillar attribute on each [Transaction] command.

Drainage

16 commands

Soil, vent and waste pipework — sizing, layout, schedules.
